turn_response.narrative_text: 1-3 short paragraphs in second-person present tense. Separate paragraphs with a literal \n\n.
turn_response.current_appearance: Precise, surgical description of current physical state. All body parts except those covered by clothing should be mentioned. 1 to 3 sentences of objective, anatomical detailing. Use the metric system exclusively. Provide numerical measurements for height (cm), weight (kg), and bodily proportions. IF male genitalia is visible: Note the erect length OR flaccid length (cm), whether circumcised or uncircumcised, and testicle presence. IF female genitalia is visible: Note the general appearance of the labia (e.g., 'neat,' 'full,' 'prominent inner lips'), and pubic hair style (e.g., 'natural,' 'trimmed,' 'shaved'). NEVER MENTION BODY PARTS THAT ARE COVERED BY CLOTHING. Clothing should not be mentioned. Don't set if nothing changed in appearance this turn.
turn_response.set_current_inventory: Complete, updated inventory list (not a diff). Omit the field if inventory did not change.
turn_response.npc_changes: List of updates for existing NPCs whose state changed this turn.
turn_response.npc_introductions: List of newly introduced NPCs with full details. Omit the field if there are no new NPCs.

world_state_update.current_scene: Unique 1-5 word name of the player's immediate location.
world_state_update.current_date: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Date should reflect the date of events happening.
world_state_update.time_of_day: 24-hour HH:MM time of when events took place.
world_state_update.memory: Running summary of key events and important facts.
world_state_update.locations: List of all known locations in the story so far.

npc_update.name: NPC name to update.
npc_update.current_location: Current unique location name. Describes concrete room. Update only when changed. Should be precise. Avoid `her house`, instead do `{name}'s bathroom`
npc_update.current_appearance: Precise, surgical description of current physical state. All body parts except those covered by clothing should be mentioned. 1 to 3 sentences of objective, anatomical detailing. Use the metric system exclusively. Provide numerical measurements for height (cm), weight (kg), and bodily proportions. IF male genitalia is visible: Note the erect length OR flaccid length (cm), whether circumcised or uncircumcised, and testicle presence. IF female genitalia is visible: Note the general appearance of the labia (e.g., 'neat,' 'full,' 'prominent inner lips'), and pubic hair style (e.g., 'natural,' 'trimmed,' 'shaved'). NEVER MENTION BODY PARTS THAT ARE COVERED BY CLOTHING. Clothing should not be mentioned. Don't set if nothing changed in appearance this turn.

location.name: Unique location name. Describes concrete room. Update only when changed. Should be precise. Avoid `her house`, instead do `{surname}'s bathroom`
location.description: Very short description of how the location looks. Don't mention characters in room.
location.characters: List of characters currently in this location.
location.character: Character name present in this location.
location.available_items: List of items available to use or take in this location.
location.available_item: Item entry available at this location.

appearance.baseline_appearance: Precise, surgical description of baseline physical state (full, not partial). All body parts should be mentioned. Don't mention temporary appearance. 1 to 3 sentences of objective, anatomical detailing. Use the metric system exclusively. Provide numerical measurements for height (cm), weight (kg), and bodily proportions. For male genitalia: Note the erect length and flaccid length (cm), whether circumcised or uncircumcised, and testicle presence. For female genitalia: Note the general appearance of the labia (e.g., 'neat,' 'full,' 'prominent inner lips'), and pubic hair style (e.g., 'natural,' 'trimmed,' 'shaved').
appearance.current_clothing: Precise, surgical full current clothing description in the same style as baseline, including all layers and accessories (do not omit unchanged layers). Catalog exhaustively. Detail every layer, including outerwear, underwear, accessories, and medical dressings/bandages. If garments are sheer, mesh, or transparent, objectively detail the specific underlying anatomical structures visible through the fabric (e.g., 'areolae visible through unlined silk'). Never output 'None'; omit the field if unchanged.
appearance.current_appearance: Precise, surgical description of current physical state. All body parts except those covered by clothing should be mentioned. 1 to 3 sentences of objective, anatomical detailing. Use the metric system exclusively. Provide numerical measurements for height (cm), weight (kg), and bodily proportions. IF male genitalia is visible: Note the erect length OR flaccid length (cm), whether circumcised or uncircumcised, and testicle presence. IF female genitalia is visible: Note the general appearance of the labia (e.g., 'neat,' 'full,' 'prominent inner lips'), and pubic hair style (e.g., 'natural,' 'trimmed,' 'shaved'). NEVER MENTION BODY PARTS THAT ARE COVERED BY CLOTHING. Clothing should not be mentioned. Don't set if nothing changed in appearance this turn.

character.name: Full legal name.
character.gender: Character gender (male, female, futanari, intersex and so on).
character.general_description: General description for the character when detailed appearance/clothing is disabled.
character.current_location: Current unique location name. Describes concrete room. Update only when changed. Should be precise. Avoid `her house`, instead do `{name}'s bathroom`
character.current_activity: Concise, factual description of what the character is doing right now.

story_modules.track_npcs: Whether to track NPC state and updates.
story_modules.track_locations: Whether to track locations list and presence.
story_modules.character_detail_mode: Character detail mode: detailed or general.
story_modules.character_appearance_clothing: Whether to include player appearance and clothing fields (detailed mode only).
story_modules.character_personality_traits: Whether to include player personality traits.
story_modules.character_major_flaws: Whether to include player major flaws.
story_modules.npc_appearance_clothing: Whether to include NPC appearance and clothing fields.
story_modules.npc_personality_traits: Whether to include NPC personality traits.
story_modules.npc_major_flaws: Whether to include NPC major flaws.

story.title: 3-5 word title tied to the opening scenario.
story.opening_scenario: 1-3 paragraphs separated by a blank line.
story.starting_date: Starting date in YYYY-MM-DD format. It should be appropriate for time setting of the story.
story.starting_time: Starting time in 24h HH:MM format. It should be in line with opening of the story.
story.character_general_description: General description for the player character at story start.
story.pregen_npcs: List of pre-generated NPCs with full details.

requests.action_mode: Action mode: do, say, or story.

chat_next_speaker.speaker_member_id: Chat member ID to speak next.

create_story.character_data: Inline character data when not using character_id.

take_turn.request_id: Optional client request ID for idempotency.

traits.personality_traits: List of 2-5 personality traits describing stable temperament and behavior. Each entry is a concise temperament or behavior descriptor of 1-8 words.
traits.major_flaws: List of 0-3 major flaws describing significant, enduring weaknesses or liabilities. Each entry is a significant, enduring weakness or liability of 1-8 words.
traits.quirks: List of 0-5 quirks describing small, idiosyncratic habits or mannerisms. Each entry is a small, specific habit or mannerism of 1-8 words.
traits.perks: List of 0-5 perks describing practical advantages, talents, or resources. Each entry is a concrete advantage, talent, or resource of 1-8 words.
